richContent.description: Internal renderer surface for Monaco editing, Shiki previews, Markdown, Mermaid, KaTeX, and diff highlighting.

sample.body: This Markdown preview uses the shared code renderer and the Mermaid renderer.
sample.heading: Markdown preview

richContent.title: Rich content components

auth.browserOpened: Copy this code, then open GitHub to authorize the app.
auth.electronRequired: Authentication is only available in the desktop app window.
auth.missingClientId: GITHUB_CLIENT_ID is not configured. Add it to your .env file or use a personal token.
auth.subtitle: Connect your GitHub account to start triage.
auth.title: Sign in

appearance.codeFontSizeDescription: Applies to editors and rendered code blocks.
appearance.codeHighlightDescription: Choose separate Shiki themes for light and dark mode.

keyboard.description: Review and customize keyboard shortcuts for navigation, tabs, panels, bookmarks, and repository sections.
keyboard.recorderInvalid: Press a letter, number, symbol, or navigation key with optional modifiers.

errors.load: Keyboard shortcuts could not be loaded. Defaults are still available.
errors.save: Keyboard shortcuts could not be saved.

workspaceSearch.label: Search or go to
workspaceSearch.description: Open the workspace search and quick navigation dialog.

workspaceGoBack.label: Go back
workspaceGoBack.description: Navigate to the previous workspace location.

workspaceGoForward.label: Go forward
workspaceGoForward.description: Navigate to the next workspace location.

workspaceToggleSidebar.label: Toggle sidebar
workspaceToggleSidebar.description: Expand or collapse the left workspace sidebar.

workspaceToggleRightPanel.label: Toggle preview panel
workspaceToggleRightPanel.description: Open or close the right preview panel.

workspaceToggleBookmark.label: Toggle bookmark
workspaceToggleBookmark.description: Add or remove a bookmark for the active tab.

repositorySectionOverview.label: Repository overview
repositorySectionOverview.description: Switch the active repository tab to Overview.

repositorySectionFiles.label: Repository files
repositorySectionFiles.description: Switch the active repository tab to Files.

repositorySectionPullRequests.label: Repository pull requests
repositorySectionPullRequests.description: Switch the active repository tab to Pull Requests.

repositorySectionIssues.label: Repository issues
repositorySectionIssues.description: Switch the active repository tab to Issues.

repositorySectionActions.label: Repository actions
repositorySectionActions.description: Switch the active repository tab to Actions.

repositorySectionSettings.label: Repository settings
repositorySectionSettings.description: Switch the active repository tab to Settings.

organization.description: {owner} is ready for organization-specific navigation. Repository, member, and activity data will be connected here.

activity.description: A future activity stream can collect reviews, notifications, and workflow signals for this organization.
activity.title: Activity

repositories.description: This area will become the organization repository surface, with filters and quick entry points.
repositories.title: Repositories

repository.description: {repository} is ready for repository navigation. Real repository data will be connected here later.

overview.description: This placeholder will become the repository overview with branches, issues, and workflow entry points.
overview.title: Overview

missingScopes.description: Reconnect GitHub to grant: {scopes}. Some repository data may be hidden until these scopes are available.
missingScopes.title: More GitHub permissions are required

empty.description: This repository does not have files on the selected branch.
empty.title: No files

missingIdentity.description: Open a repository tab with an owner and repository name to browse files.
missingIdentity.title: Repository is not available

preview.downloadDescription: This file cannot be previewed in Oh My GitHub.
preview.error: The preview could not be loaded. Download the file instead.

truncated.description: GitHub returned a partial tree because this repository is large. The available files are still shown.
truncated.title: Partial file tree

empty.allDescription: This repository does not have pull requests that match the current filters.
empty.closedDescription: This repository does not have closed pull requests.
empty.missingRepositoryDescription: Open a repository with an owner and name to load pull requests.
empty.openDescription: This repository does not have open pull requests.
empty.searchDescription: No pull requests match this search.
empty.title: No pull requests

error.description: GitHub pull requests could not be loaded. Check the connection and try again.
error.title: Could not load pull requests

pagination.incomplete: GitHub returned incomplete search results. Try narrowing the search.

empty.allDescription: This repository does not have issues that match the current filters.
empty.closedDescription: This repository does not have closed issues.
empty.missingRepositoryDescription: Open a repository with an owner and name to load issues.
empty.openDescription: This repository does not have open issues.
empty.title: No issues

error.description: GitHub issues could not be loaded. Check the connection and try again.
error.title: Could not load issues

pagination.incomplete: GitHub returned incomplete search results. Try narrowing the search.

contributing.description: Contribution guidelines will appear here once repository files are connected.
contributing.title: Contributing

empty.description: This repository does not expose a README or community document through GitHub yet.
empty.title: No repository document

license.description: License details will appear here once repository files are connected.
license.title: License

readme.description: The README preview will appear here once repository files are connected.
readme.title: README

empty.description: This section is intentionally empty for now so it can be refined in place later.
empty.title: {section} is ready

pullRequest.description: {repository} {number} is open as a pull request workspace. Review, check, and conversation data will be connected here later.

activity.description: A future activity area can collect comments, review requests, and timeline events.
activity.title: Activity

overview.description: This placeholder will become the pull request overview with status, reviewers, and merge readiness.
overview.title: Overview

pullRequestList.description: {category} is ready as a pull request list workspace. The concrete pull requests are available from the sidebar tree.

overview.description: This placeholder will become the focused pull request list for the selected category.
overview.title: List overview

sidebar.description: Expand the sidebar category to open individual pull requests from this list.
sidebar.title: Sidebar items

issue.description: {repository} {number} is open as an issue workspace. Conversation, labels, and project data will be connected here later.

activity.empty: No activity has been loaded for this issue yet.

comment.error: Comment could not be posted. Check your permissions and try again.

missingIdentity.description: Open an issue tab with an owner, repository, and issue number to load the discussion.
missingIdentity.title: Issue is not available

unavailable.description: GitHub did not return an issue for this tab. It may have moved, been deleted, or require more permissions.
unavailable.title: Issue could not be found

error.description: GitHub issue details could not be loaded. Check the connection and try again.
error.title: Could not load issue

activity.description: A future activity area can collect comments, assignments, and project updates.
activity.title: Activity

overview.description: This placeholder will become the issue overview with labels, assignees, and linked work.
overview.title: Overview

issueList.description: {category} is ready as an issue list workspace. The concrete issues are available from the sidebar tree.

overview.description: This placeholder will become the focused issue list for the selected category.
overview.title: List overview

sidebar.description: Expand the sidebar category to open individual issues from this list.
sidebar.title: Sidebar items

folderErrors.duplicate: A folder with this name already exists.

search.description: Search for GitHub accounts, organizations, and repositories.
search.placeholder: Search GitHub or paste a URL
search.resolveError: Could not resolve this target. Try a search instead.
search.title: Search workspace

download.description: This file cannot be previewed in Oh My GitHub.
download.title: Download file

rightPanel.empty: No preview is open. Code, image, video, and Markdown previews will appear here.
rightPanel.title: Preview

draftOutline.description: This local draft panel is a placeholder for future data and editor surfaces.
draftOutline.title: Blank workspace page

mergeReadiness.description: Reserved for merge checks, CI state, and reviewer feedback.
mergeReadiness.title: Merge readiness

nextStep.description: Later this tab can bind to a real repository, query, or local workspace state.
nextStep.title: Waiting for data

releaseWatch.description: Reserved for releases, workflows, and recent publication signals.
releaseWatch.title: Release watch

repositoryFocus.description: Reserved for repository groups, pinned projects, and recent workspaces.
repositoryFocus.title: Repository focus

resourcePlaceholder.description: This tab is identified by its URL and type. Real data loading comes later.
resourcePlaceholder.title: Resource content

resourceRouting.description: This version only verifies routing, tab type, and restore behavior without calling the GitHub API.
resourceRouting.title: URL-driven state

reviewQueue.description: Reserved for pull requests, mentions, and notifications that need attention.
reviewQueue.title: Triage queue

reviewStack.description: Reserved for prioritized review tasks and contextual summaries.
reviewStack.title: Review stack

workflowFeed.description: Reserved for GitHub Actions, failing checks, and deployment state.
workflowFeed.title: Workflow feed

descriptions.account: {owner} is open as an account tab. This version only keeps URL, type, and placeholder state.
descriptions.activity: Track workflows, repository movement, and project state worth revisiting. This version only renders the shell.
descriptions.draft: New tabs open as local placeholder pages until real workspace data is connected.
descriptions.inbox: Collect notifications, mentions, and review requests into a clean workspace entry point.
descriptions.org: {owner} is open as an organization tab. This version only keeps URL, type, and placeholder state.
descriptions.pullRequest: Pull request data for {owner}/{repo} #{number} will be connected here.
descriptions.pullRequestList: Pull requests in this category are listed from the sidebar tree. A full list view can be connected here later.
descriptions.issue: Issue data for {owner}/{repo} #{number} will be connected here.
descriptions.issueList: Issues in this category are listed from the sidebar tree. A full list view can be connected here later.
descriptions.notFound: No GitHub account, organization, or repository matched this input.
descriptions.repo: {owner}/{repo} is open as a repository tab. This version only keeps URL, type, and placeholder state.
descriptions.reviews: Keep pull requests and merge checks in a focused tab that can grow into real data later.
descriptions.searchResult: Results are loaded from the GitHub Search API.

empty.description: Try a different query or broaden the search.
empty.noQueryDescription: Open Search workspace and choose a search action.
empty.title: No results

error.description: GitHub could not return these search results.
error.title: Search failed

searchResult.incomplete: GitHub returned incomplete search results. Try narrowing the search.
searchResult.title: Search "{query}"

notFound.description: Check the spelling, paste a GitHub URL, or search GitHub results.
notFound.title: Could not find "{input}"
